title: Concurrent launcher with watchdog and stale-detection relaunch
objective: Create a unified launch script that starts both the mlb_model shadow engine and sports_bot_v2 bot concurrently, monitors both with a watchdog loop, and restarts either process if it exits. Enhance model_bridge.py to detect when all recommendations are stale and log a clear ALL_STALE warning so the condition is visible in logs. Paper mode only. No architecture changes.
paper_only_notice: THIS IS PAPER MODE ONLY. No real money. No live execution. This task manages local Python subprocesses only.
architecture: launch_all.py is a standalone supervisor script. It starts two subprocesses: the shadow engine and the bot. It monitors both in a watchdog loop.
If either subprocess exits for any reason, the launcher logs the exit, waits RESTART_DELAY_SECONDS, then restarts it.
The launcher does not modify either process — it only starts and monitors them.
model_bridge.py gets a single new log line: when all candidates after dedup are stale (or the working set is empty), log BRIDGE ALL STALE so the condition is clearly visible.
The launcher handles keeping both alive. model_bridge does not need to trigger restarts — that is the launcher's job.

behavior: Start both processes immediately on launch.
If a process exits with any return code, log: LAUNCHER: [name] exited (code=N) — restarting in Xs
Wait RESTART_DELAY_SECONDS then restart that process only.
Log each restart: LAUNCHER: [name] restarted (attempt N)
On KeyboardInterrupt/SIGTERM: terminate both subprocesses cleanly and exit.
Do not use threading or asyncio — a simple polling loop with subprocess.poll() is sufficient and safe.
launch_all_spec.stdout_stderr_handling: Redirect both stdout and stderr of each subprocess to their respective log files. Do not suppress output.

model_bridge_addition.where: In get_approved_intents(), after dedup and NO_TRADE filtering, before the gate loop.
model_bridge_addition.what: If the working set is empty (no actionable candidates after dedup), log: BRIDGE ALL STALE — no actionable recommendations found; shadow engine may not be running or all recs are stale. Return [] immediately.
model_bridge_addition.existing_log_behavior: The current path returns [] silently when no candidates pass. Replace that silent return with the explicit log line above.

acceptance_criteria: launch_all.py exists and starts both shadow engine and bot_core as concurrent subprocesses
Both processes log to their respective log files
If either process exits, the launcher restarts it after RESTART_DELAY_SECONDS
LAUNCHER: [name] exited and LAUNCHER: [name] restarted log lines appear on restart
model_bridge.py logs BRIDGE ALL STALE when working set is empty after dedup
No changes to bot_core.py, db.py, paper_exec.py, dashboard files, or mlb_model
verification: Confirm both shadow engine and bot_core start and log output appears
Confirm BRIDGE ALL STALE appears in logs if no fresh recs exist at startup
Confirm BRIDGE GATE REJECT lines appear once shadow engine produces fresh recs
Optionally: kill one subprocess manually and confirm launcher restarts it
rollback: Delete launch_all.py and revert core/model_bridge.py. Both processes can still be run manually as before.
